word: G5012 - ταπεινοφροσύνη - tapeinophrosýnē - tap-i-nof-ros-oo'-nay - Humbleness of mind

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Humbleness of mind
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
the having a humble opinion of oneself; a deep sense of one's (moral) littleness; modesty, humility, lowliness of mind, humble - minded, having a modest opinion of oneself
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G5011 and the base of G5424; humiliation of mind, that is, modesty: - humbleness of mind, humility (of mind), lowliness (of mind).
